info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Material Master (Product) API
info.description:
Access material master data including product information, descriptions, sales-relevant data, plant data, and storage location data. This OData service (API_PRODUCT_SRV) provides read and write access to product records used across procurement, manufacturing, and sales processes in SAP S/4HANA.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

request.description: Returns a collection of material master records. Use OData query options to filter by material number, material type, material group, and other attributes. Supports $expand for descriptions, plant data, and sales data.
